holdings.infoBox: OARK is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax Innovation Option Income Strategy ETF (OARK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the ARK Innovation ETF (ARKK) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. OARK was launched on Nov 22, 2022 and is issued by YieldMax.
